zh.lifeSummary: Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria是Oddone Del Vasto和Berta di Turino的兒子，於大約1055年出生在義大利阿布盧左迪瓦斯托。他於大約1108年與Agnès de Vermandois在義大利利古里亞薩沃納薩沃納結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1125年10月5日在義大利馬安科納洛雷托享年71歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左卡特德拉爾 瑪麗亞 維吉 阿辛塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria是Oddone Del Vasto和Berta di Turino的儿子，于大约1055年出生在意大利阿布盧左迪瓦斯托。他于大约1108年与Agnès de Vermandois在意大利利古里亞薩沃納薩沃納结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1125年10月5日在意大利馬安科納洛雷托享年71岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左卡特德拉爾 瑪麗亞 維吉 阿辛塔。

nameMeanings.name: del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Vasto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Reynaldo, Alejandro, Andres, Carlito, Humberto, Jaime, Javier, Lilia, Luiz, Luz.  Portuguese Guilherme.
Portuguese and Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Basto in Portugal, from basto ‘dense (wood)’. This surname is also found in southwestern Spain.

nameMeanings.name: della
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Vijayakumar, Manjula, Nalini, Rao.  Italian Amadeo, Antonio, Nicola, Nino.  Spanish Eduardo, Emilio, Gustavo, Jose, Manuel, Mariano.
Italian: from the feminine form of   Tello  . Compare   La Tella  .
Aragonese and Galician: probably a habitational name from any of the places in Huesca (Aragon, Spain) or A Coruña (Galicia, Spain) called Tella, possibly from tella ‘(roof) tile’ (from Latin tegula).

variants.name: Tello
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jorge, Fernando, Pedro, Francisco, Arturo, Miguel, Carlos, Manuel, Pablo.
Spanish: from the medieval personal name Tello, Latinized as Tellus, probably of ancient Germanic origin.
Italian: from a short form of a personal name formed with this suffix, as for example Donatello, Muscatello , Otello.

variants.name: La Tella
meanings: Italian (mainly Latella): variant of Tella , with the addition of the definite article la.

nameMeanings.name: Bonifacio
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Bonifatius ‘good fate’; borne by several early saints.

en.lifeSummary: Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria was born about 1055, in Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italy as the son of Oddone Del Vasto and Berta di Turino. He married Agnès de Vermandois about 1108, in Savona, Savona, Liguria, Italy. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 5 October 1125, in Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Italy, at the age of 71, and was buried in Cattedrale Maria Vergine Assunta, Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria est né environ 1055, à Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italie, fils de Oddone Del Vasto et Berta di Turino. Il a épousé Agnès de Vermandois environ 1108, à Savona, Savona, Liguria, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 5 octobre 1125, à Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Italie, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Cattedrale Maria Vergine Assunta, Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie.

Lui sposato Agnès de Vermandois circa 1108, nel Savona, Savona, Liguria, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguriaは約1055年にイタリアアブルズゾチエティヴァストーでOddone Del VastoとBerta di Turinoの息子として生まれた。約1108年にイタリアリグリアサボナサボナでAgnès de Vermandoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1125年10月5日にイタリアマルチェアンコナロアトーで71歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾカッテドラル マリア バージン アスンタにて埋葬された。

ko.Cattedrale Maria Vergine Assunta, Saluzz: 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오 카테드라일 마이아 베르긴 아선타
ko.lifeSummary: Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria(은)는 대략 1055년 이탈리아 아브루즈오 치티 바스토에서 Oddone Del Vasto(와)과 Berta di Turino의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1108년 이탈리아 리구리아 서아폰아 서아폰아에서 Agnès de Vermandois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1125년 10월 5일 이탈리아 마체 앤코나 로레토에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오 카테드라일 마이아 베르긴 아선타에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria nasceu aproximadamente 1055, em Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Itália filho de Oddone Del Vasto e Berta di Turino. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Vermandois aproximadamente 1108, em Savona, Savona, Liguria, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1125, em Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Itália, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Cattedrale Maria Vergine Assunta, Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.Cattedrale Maria Vergine Assunta, Saluzz: каттедреил маря виргаин ассунта, салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria родился около 1055 г. в местности васто, чиети, абруззо, Италия. Его родителей звали Oddone Del Vasto и Berta di Turino. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Vermandois около 1108 г. в местности савона, савона, лигуря, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 5 октября 1125 г. в местности лорето, анкона, марч, Италия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности каттедреил маря виргаин ассунта, салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Bonifacio del Vasto della Liguria nació aproximadamente 1055, en Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italia como hijo de Oddone Del Vasto y Berta di Turino. Se casó con Agnès de Vermandois aproximadamente 1108, en Savona, Savona, Liguria, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1125, en Loreto, Ancona, Marche, Italia, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Cattedrale Maria Vergine Assunta, Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.
